hooks.command: cd 'D:/courses/web application/demo' && { git diff --quiet && git diff --staged --quiet && [ -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; } || { git add -A && git commit -m "auto: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') [claude]" && git push; } 2>/dev/null || true
$json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -and $f.EndsWith(".java")) { Set-Location "D:/courses/web application/demo"; mvn spotless:apply -q 2>$null }; exit 0
